title: Negotiating a Raise with the Manager

all.en: I had been preparing for this conversation with my manager for several weeks.
all.zh: 我已經為這場與主管的對話準備了好幾個星期。

all.en: I gathered evidence of my achievements, including the two projects I had led successfully.
all.zh: 我蒐集了自己成就的證據，包括我成功帶領的兩個專案。

all.en: I also researched the average salary for my role in the local job market.
all.zh: 我還研究了當地就業市場上我這個職位的平均薪資。

all.en: When I knocked on her door, she invited me in with a friendly nod.
all.zh: 當我敲門時，她友善地點頭請我進去。

all.en: I stated my request clearly, asking for a fifteen percent salary increase.
all.zh: 我清楚地提出我的要求，請求百分之十五的加薪。

all.en: She raised her eyebrows but did not immediately reject the idea.
all.zh: 她揚起眉毛，但並未立刻拒絕這個提議。

all.en: I listed my contributions, explaining how I had helped the team exceed its goals.
all.zh: 我列出我的貢獻，說明我如何協助團隊超越目標。

all.en: She countered with a smaller offer and mentioned the tight budget this quarter.
all.zh: 她以較低的金額還價，並提及這一季的預算很緊。

all.en: After some back-and-forth, we settled on a ten percent raise plus an extra bonus.
all.zh: 經過幾番來回討論，我們最後達成百分之十的加薪外加一筆額外獎金。

all.en: I thanked her sincerely and promised to keep delivering strong results.
all.zh: 我誠摯地向她道謝，並承諾會繼續交出亮眼的成果。

all.en: Walking back to my desk, I felt my confidence had grown more than my paycheck.
all.zh: 走回座位的路上，我覺得自己的信心增長得比薪水還多。

all.en: That evening, I shared the news with my husband over a celebratory home-cooked dinner.
all.zh: 當晚，我和先生一邊享用慶祝的家常晚餐，一邊分享了這個好消息。

all.en: He poured two small glasses of wine and toasted to my hard-earned negotiation skills.
all.zh: 他倒了兩小杯酒，為我得來不易的談判能力舉杯致敬。

all.en: The next day, I emailed my manager a written summary of everything we had agreed on.
all.zh: 隔天，我寄了一封電子郵件，把我們達成的所有共識整理成書面紀錄寄給主管。

all.en: She replied within an hour, thanking me for being so professional and well prepared.
all.zh: 她在一小時內回信，感謝我表現得如此專業且準備充分。

all.en: At the next team meeting, she publicly recognized my contributions to the latest launch.
all.zh: 在下一次團隊會議上，她公開表揚了我對最新上線專案的貢獻。

all.en: My colleagues congratulated me quietly afterward, and several asked for negotiation tips.
all.zh: 會後同事們低聲向我道賀，幾位還向我請教談判的訣竅。

all.en: I drafted a simple guide on preparation, market research, and clear, confident speaking.
all.zh: 我整理了一份簡單的指南，內容包含準備、市場調查與清楚自信的表達。

all.en: I saved a portion of my first raised paycheck for a long-postponed family vacation.
all.zh: 我把第一次加薪後的部分薪水存下來，準備一趟期盼已久的家族旅行。

all.en: Over the next quarter, I worked even harder to prove that I deserved the new salary.
all.zh: 接下來的一季，我加倍努力，證明自己值得這份新的薪資。

all.en: When the year ended, my manager hinted that another promotion might be on the way.
all.zh: 年底時，主管暗示下一次升遷可能也已經在路上了。

all.en: Three months later, my manager called me into her office for a quiet chat.
all.zh: 三個月後，主管把我叫進辦公室進行一次安靜的談話。

all.en: She told me the leadership team had been watching my recent project closely.
all.zh: 她告訴我，高層團隊一直在密切關注我最近的專案。

all.en: They wanted to promote me to senior associate starting from the next quarter.
all.zh: 他們希望從下一季開始把我升為資深專員。

all.en: I felt my heart leap, but I asked for one day to consider the responsibilities.
all.zh: 我心跳加速，但我請求給我一天的時間思考相關責任。

all.en: That night, I wrote down the pros and cons of accepting the new position.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我寫下了接受新職位的優缺點清單。

all.en: My husband listened patiently and reminded me how far I had already come.
all.zh: 先生耐心傾聽，提醒我已經走了多遠的路。

all.en: The next morning, I accepted the promotion with a clear and steady voice.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我以清晰穩定的聲音接受了這次升遷。

all.en: My manager smiled and said she had never doubted my decision for a moment.
all.zh: 主管微笑著說，她從未有一刻懷疑過我的決定。

all.en: I used part of my bonus to enroll in a leadership development weekend course.
all.zh: 我用部分獎金報名了一個週末的領導力發展課程。

all.en: Six months later, I was mentoring two junior colleagues with the same patience shown to me.
all.zh: 六個月後，我以同樣的耐心指導兩位資淺同事，就像當初有人對我那樣。
